title: Threat Intel Feeds + Ecosystem Risk — Live Feed Ingestion & Dedup Pipeline
description: test_threat_intelligence_feeds.py and suite-evidence-risk/risk/feeds/ecosystems.py define 28+ threat intel sources and ecosystem risk models. test_ruthless_bug_hunting.py clusters here. The feed manager has source registration CRUD but actual HTTP ingestion from live feeds (OTX AlienVault, URLhaus, AbuseIPDB) is stubbed pending API key registration.
missing: OTX AlienVault live ingestion: implement OTX API v2 client that fetches pulses daily and normalizes to IOC records in threat_intel_platform_engine
URLhaus live ingestion: fetch https://urlhaus-api.abuse.ch/v1/urls/recent/ daily and insert malicious URLs into ip_reputation_engine
AbuseIPDB live ingestion: fetch bulk blacklist via AbuseIPDB API v2 /blacklist endpoint and sync into ip_reputation.db daily
